name: novakai
description: A spatial diagram tool for dev work — drag-and-drop flowcharts with two-way Mermaid sync, themes, and exports.

scripts.flowmap:bundle: node tools/flowmap/bundle.mjs --root docs/flowmap/root.mmd --dir src > docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd.tmp && mv docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd.tmp docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd
scripts.flowmap:exports: node tools/flowmap/exports-coverage.mjs --map docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd --tsconfig tsconfig.json --src src --allow docs/flowmap/curation-allowlist.txt
scripts.flowmap:gate: node tools/buildspec/pipeline/extract.mjs --map docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd --tsconfig tsconfig.json --out /tmp/flowmap-extracted.mmd && node tools/buildspec/pipeline/gate.mjs --spec docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd --code /tmp/flowmap-extracted.mmd
scripts.flowmap:drift: npm run flowmap:bundle && node tools/flowmap/validate.mjs docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd && node tools/flowmap/flowmap-lint.mjs docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd && npm run flowmap:coverage && npm run flowmap:exports && npm run flowmap:gate && npm run flowmap:edges
scripts.flowmap:bodies: node tools/buildspec/pipeline/extract.mjs --map docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd --tsconfig tsconfig.json --out /tmp/extracted.mmd && cp /tmp/extracted.bodies.json public/bodies.json
scripts.flowmap:ship: node tools/flowmap/metrics.mjs wrap --event ship -- npm run flowmap:ship:steps
scripts.flowmap:ship:steps: npm run flowmap:bundle && node tools/flowmap/validate.mjs docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd && node tools/flowmap/flowmap-lint.mjs docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd && npm run flowmap:coverage && npm run flowmap:exports && npm run flowmap:gate && npm run flowmap:edges && npm run flowmap:bodies && node tools/flowmap/ship-stamp.mjs && echo 'DONE: map is grammar-valid + structurally sound (lint pass), file-complete (coverage) + symbol-complete (exports) + in sync with code (gate) + edges code-backed-or-audited (edge-verify), bodies.json regenerated from real source, and ship-stamp.json records the src/ content this ship verified.'
scripts.spec:test:all: node --test tools/buildspec/pipeline/pipeline.test.mjs tools/buildspec/pipeline/parser-conformance.test.mjs tools/buildspec/core/slice-core.test.mjs tools/buildspec/scaffold/writeback.test.mjs tools/buildspec/testkit/plan-layout.test.mjs tools/buildspec/testkit/plan-from-diff.test.mjs tools/buildspec/acceptance/acceptance.test.mjs tools/flowmap/plan-cert.test.mjs tools/flowmap/flowmap-lint.test.mjs tools/flowmap/flowmap-lint.discriminate.test.mjs tools/buildspec/core/normtype.test.mjs tools/flowmap/edge-verify.test.mjs tools/flowmap/plan-check.test.mjs tools/flowmap/approve-export.test.mjs tools/flowmap/loop-e2e.test.mjs tools/flowmap/canonical.test.mjs tools/flowmap/contract.test.mjs tools/flowmap/verify-change.test.mjs tools/flowmap/replay.test.mjs tools/flowmap/contract-gate.test.mjs tools/flowmap/edit-gate.test.mjs tools/flowmap/plan-gate.test.mjs tools/flowmap/ship-staleness.test.mjs tools/flowmap/waves.test.mjs tools/flowmap/handoff-fresh.test.mjs tools/flowmap/orchestrate.test.mjs tools/flowmap/tooling-map.test.mjs tools/flowmap/roadmap.test.mjs tools/flowmap/quiz.test.mjs tools/flowmap/gate-parity.test.mjs tools/flowmap/onboard.test.mjs tools/flowmap/cli-wiring.test.mjs tools/flowmap/completeness.test.mjs tools/buildspec/pipeline/conformance-strict.test.mjs tools/flowmap/status.test.mjs tools/flowmap/mutate.test.mjs tools/flowmap/lib/metrics-log.test.mjs tools/flowmap/metrics.test.mjs tools/flowmap/turns.test.mjs tools/flowmap/turn-gate.test.mjs tools/buildspec/testkit/diff.test.mjs && node tools/buildspec/testkit/run-bundled-test.mjs tools/buildspec/testkit/diff-views.test.mjs && node tools/buildspec/testkit/run-bundled-test.mjs tools/buildspec/testkit/diff-roundtrip.test.mjs && node tools/buildspec/testkit/run-bundled-test.mjs tools/buildspec/testkit/viewspec.test.mjs
scripts.flowmap:backfill: for f in $(find src -name '*.flowmap.mmd'); do node tools/buildspec/scaffold/scaffold.mjs --backfill "$f" --tsconfig tsconfig.json; done
scripts.flowmap:tooling:bundle: node tools/flowmap/bundle.mjs --root docs/flowmap/root-tools.mmd --dir tools > docs/flowmap/_tooling.mmd.tmp && mv docs/flowmap/_tooling.mmd.tmp docs/flowmap/_tooling.mmd
scripts.flowmap:tooling:verify: npm run flowmap:tooling:bundle && node tools/flowmap/validate.mjs docs/flowmap/_tooling.mmd && node tools/flowmap/flowmap-lint.mjs docs/flowmap/_tooling.mmd && node tools/flowmap/tooling-coverage.mjs && node --test tools/flowmap/tooling-map.test.mjs && echo 'DONE: tooling map bundled + grammar-valid + architectural (lint) + complete & symbol-true (tooling-coverage) + deterministic (test).'
scripts.flowmap:roadmap:audit: node tools/flowmap/roadmap.mjs --audit-doc CLAUDE.md && node tools/flowmap/roadmap.mjs --audit-tree docs --allow docs/flowmap/status-ban-allowlist.txt
scripts.flowmap:verify: npm run flowmap:bundle && node tools/flowmap/validate.mjs docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd && node tools/flowmap/flowmap-lint.mjs docs/flowmap/_bundle.mmd && npm run flowmap:coverage && npm run flowmap:exports && npm run flowmap:gate && npm run flowmap:edges
scripts.flowmap:verify:full: npm run flowmap:verify && npm run flowmap:roadmap:audit && npm run flowmap:cert -- --plan public/plan.json && npm run flowmap:plan-check -- --plan public/plan.json && npm run flowmap:acceptance -- --plan public/plan.json && npm run flowmap:handoff:check && echo 'DONE: full CI-equivalent gate chain green (drift + roadmap:audit + cert + plan-check + acceptance + handoff-fresh) — same list spec-gate.yml enforces (F-06).'
